# Smart School ERP Workspace Instructions

This workspace contains a React + Tailwind frontend and an Express backend.

## Goals
- Run frontend from `frontend`
- Run backend from `backend`
- Use GitHub Actions for CI

## Commands
- Frontend development: `cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev`
- Backend development: `cd backend && npm install && npm run dev`
- Root CI readiness: install packages in both workspaces and run build scripts
